Awake (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,373,825Details
International Box Office $18,594,823
Worldwide Box Office $32,968,648
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,665,326
Total $13,665,326
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,856,872 (40.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.45 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$8,600,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,002 opening theaters/2,023 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $24,963,941

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 30th, 2007 (Wide) by Weinstein Co.
Video Release: March 4th, 2008 by Weinstein Co./Genius
MPA Rating: R for language, an intense disturbing situation, and brief drug use.
Running Time: 84 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Accidental Death, Mariticide / Uxoricide, Medical and Hospitals, Medical Crimes, Out of Body Experience, Surprise Twist, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Japanese
